libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the generated test/build setup applies these runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 as well: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 with an ephemeral port for WebClient coverage rather than external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API references io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2, which is optional and not pulled transitively; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
External live HTTP services would make tests flaky and are unnecessary because the client can be exercised against an embedded Vert.x server.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage: the artifact brings Vert.x Core and Netty transitively, and normal use is against an HTTP endpoint that can be an in-process Vert.x HttpServer. However, Vert.x 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x, so the existing Java 25/native-image Netty runtime properties used for 5.0.0 should also apply to 5.0.1.
